summary: Update mode: Verified onboarding bug fix. Upgrade step (continue-free-btn) is now reachable. Updated 3 spec files and helpers to reflect the corrected flow. All 24 tests pass.
seed_data_creation: New test users created during onboarding flow tests (pattern: ob_<timestamp>@testreg.com, gp_<timestamp>@testreg.com)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixed: updateUser({ onboarding_complete: true }) moved from handleNext() to handleSkipToResults(). Onboarding flow now: steps 0-5 → generating (step 6, auto-advances after 2s) → upgrade (step 7, user clicks continue-free-btn) → dashboard. helpers.ts completeOnboarding() and all spec files updated to click continue-free-btn before expecting dashboard URL. test@astro.com has onboarding_complete=true so use new users for onboarding tests.
rca_of_issue: Previous bug: handleNext() called updateUser({ onboarding_complete: true }) at step 6 (partner), which triggered the OnboardingRoute guard to redirect to /dashboard before step 7 (upgrade) could render, making continue-free-btn unreachable. Fix: moved updateUser call to handleSkipToResults() which is called only when continue-free-btn is clicked on the upgrade step.
